hypertrophy.reasoning: Posterior chain and arm hypertrophy work balances anterior-dominant bench and run fatigue without competing for recovery.
suggested_exercises: Dead bugs or pallof presses: 3x12 per side

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: 1-Mile Run. Workout. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, back (upper/mid), biceps.
